pi_items.source: task.json description: 'Navigate to Data > SRS List and create a new SRS with Code 990001'. Consistent with verifier.py line 16 and export_result.sh line 16.
task.json description: 'Create a new layer in the ne workspace named ne_countries_pacific using the ne_countries table'. Consistent with export_result.sh line 28 and verifier.py.

task.json WKT definition includes this exact parameter. Verified against EPSG:3832 (PDC Mercator) which uses PARAMETER["central_meridian",150] for Pacific mapping applications. See https://epsg.io/3832

pi_items.verified_value: Natural Earth 1:110m ne_110m_admin_0_countries shapefile (version 5.1.1), public domain dataset
pi_items.source: setup_geoserver.sh lines 85-119 import ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp using ogr2ogr. Verified against https://www.naturalearthdata.com/downloads/110m-cultural-vectors/
task.json WKT definition uses PROJECTION["Mercator_1SP"]. Consistent with EPSG:3832 for Pacific Mercator projections.
task.json WKT: PARAMETER["central_meridian", 150.0]. This longitude is standard for Pacific-focused projections (e.g., EPSG:3832 PDC Mercator).

privileged_info_summary: The task registers a custom Pacific Mercator projection (EPSG:990001) with central meridian at 150.0° east and publishes a reprojected layer named 'ne_countries_pacific' based on Natural Earth 1:110m country boundaries. The WKT definition follows the Mercator_1SP projection standard with parameters: central_meridian=150.0, scale_factor=1.0, false_easting=0.0, false_northing=0.0. The base data source is the real, public-domain Natural Earth ne_110m_admin_0_countries shapefile (version 5.1.1) containing 258 country boundaries.
